# DAMU is launching sound and light design studios
> 

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

DAMU is launching a new professional [program focused on lighting and audiovisual design](https://www.damu.cz/cs/katedry-programy/katedra-scenografie/studijni-programy/svetelny-a-audiovizualni-design-pro-ziva-umeni-263/) (LAD·LA), which will provide students with both knowledge and practical experience in working with light, sound, and projection for live arts. Under the guidance of experts such as [Vratislav Šrámek](https://sp.amu.cz/cs/ucitel105742.html) and [Pavla Beranová](https://www.svetelnydesign.cz/blog/team/pavla-beranova/), students will learn not only technical skills but also effective communication within creative teams. The founders spoke about [the new field](https://vltava.rozhlas.cz/svetelny-a-zvukovy-design-brzy-na-damu-jsme-invencni-ale-profesne-neukotveni-9348885) in Akcentu na Vltavě.

> “I consider LAD·LA to be an excellent answer to the question many graduates of scenography, multimedia, theatre technologies, and other fields ask: how to combine creativity with a passion for technical exploration.”
> — [Pavla Beranová](https://www.damu.cz/cs/katedry-programy/katedra-scenografie/damu-otevira-prvni-profesni-studijni-program-v-cr-4414/)

Inspiration comes from European schools such as [Rose Bruford College](https://www.bruford.ac.uk/study/postgraduate-courses/light-in-performance/) and [UniArts Helsinki](https://www.uniarts.fi/en/guides/apply-to-masters-studies-in-lighting-design/). Students undergo interdisciplinary teaching with the option to specialize in the second year, including internships at cultural institutions. Applicants must demonstrate talent and technical knowledge in the admission process, which includes tests and practical assignments. The program aims to prepare creators ready to combine creativity with technology.

Thanks to [the National Recovery Plan](https://www.planobnovycr.cz/), the program has acquired top-tier technical equipment. Graduates will find employment in theatre and event production, architecture, or commercial projects. Applications are open until March 15, 2025, and teaching will begin in the winter semester of 2025.

(Photos for the teaser: [Nadine E](https://unsplash.com/@nadineshaabana?utm_content=creditCopyText&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=unsplash), [Unsplash](https://unsplash.com/photos/round-white-led-light-ZPP-zP8HYG0?utm_content=creditCopyText&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=unsplash))
